title.en: Barry's journey from Accrington Stanley to World Cup semi-final
title.zh-CN: Barry从Accrington Stanley到世界杯半决赛的旅程

summary.en: His playing career peaked at Accrington Stanley - now Anthony Barry is Thomas Tuchel's right-hand man in England's bid for World Cup glory.
summary.zh-CN: 他的职业生涯在Accrington Stanley达到顶峰-现在Anthony Barry是Thomas Tuchel在英格兰申办世界杯时的得力助手。

title.en: Balogun expected controversy after World Cup ban waived
title.zh-CN: Balogun预计世界杯禁令放弃后会有争议

summary.en: United States striker Folarin Balogun knew the decision by Fifa to suspend his one-game ban at the World Cup was going to bring "a lot of controversy" and said it brought "nerves" on his team-mates.
summary.zh-CN: 美国前锋Folarin Balogun知道国际足联暂停他在世界杯上一场比赛禁赛的决定将带来“很多争议” ，并表示这给他的队友带来了“紧张”。

title.en: Premier League rules World Cup defences - but not attacks
title.zh-CN: 英超联赛规则世界杯防守-但不是攻击

summary.en: Do the World Cup semi-final line-ups show the world’s best attacking talent plays outside the Premier League?
summary.zh-CN: 世界杯半决赛阵容是否展示了英超联赛之外世界上最好的进攻天赋？

title.en: Lamine Yamal v Mbappe: La Liga stars set for World Cup showdown
title.zh-CN: Lamine Yamal诉Mbappe ：西甲球星将参加世界杯对决

summary.en: France face Spain for a place in the World Cup final on Tuesday, meaning a showdown between Kylian Mbappe and Lamine Yamal. Who comes out on top?
summary.zh-CN: 法国队在周二的世界杯决赛中面对西班牙队，这意味着Kylian Mbappe和Lamine Yamal之间的对决。谁位居榜首？

title.zh-CN: 埃弗顿从莱斯特签下法国前锋Mouchon

summary.zh-CN: 埃弗顿签下法国前锋Noemie Mouchon ，从莱斯特城免费转会。

title.en: Messi's lucky charm? Elfath to ref England v Argentina

summary.en: Fifa announce American referee Ismail Elfath will take charge of England's World Cup semi-final against Argentina.
summary.zh-CN: 国际足联宣布，美国裁判伊斯梅尔·埃尔法特（ Ismail Elfath ）将负责英格兰世界杯半决赛对阵阿根廷的比赛。

title.en: Increased security for England and Argentina tie
